uses: Gonzalea dicocca, also known as Yellow Mandevilla, is a plant species that has been traditionally used in various folk remedies. Its medicinal uses include treating fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. The plant's leaves and stems are said to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to soothe wounds and reduce swelling.
